title: Lovely Ladies Lyrics Naan Sigappu Manithan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Lovely Ladies
Singers: DJ Gana Bala, Vijay Prakash, Megha, Aryan Dinesh
Movie: Naan Sigappu Manithan
Music: GV Prakash

Aahhaa Lovely ladies, Lovely ladies
Aahhaa .....
Aahhaa Lovely ladies, Lovely ladies
Aahhaa dancing to the move right now

Aadu machi aadu, podu machi podu
adhiradi kalandhida oru aattam
Aadu machi aadu, podu machi podu
adhiradi kalandhida oru aattam

Appan potta road-u, vandhu aadi paaru
danda nakkaa danda nakka tharai aattam

Sattam thittam madhikkada
satta kaalar edhukkadaa
chotta chotta oothikkada
pangaali vaa aadu.

Pattam pola maarikkada
etti thaandi aerikkadaa
ketta aattam pottukkada
santhosatha thaedu.

Veettathaan thaandi veliyila vaa
vazhakaya rasikka theruvukku vaa
mutta odanja kozhi porakkum
kattupaadu odanjaadhaan
inban porakkum.
Poottu pota manasukku enna kidaikkum

Whatsapp pengala paar
posabi pola kaaramathaar
machi thotuka lightaa
adikura elasukku idhuthaan rightaa

Goa vandha koottam
roomers couple aattam
ada kaigala thottukittu
mandangala aattikittu
attam onnu aadungalen tharai aattam.

Nettru enbadhu old aanadhu
naalai enbabhu waiting list aanadhu
indru mattrum gold aanadhu
kondaadalaam vaadaaa.

Velai velai endre dhinam
temple runnai pol odinom
santhosangal ennaavadhu
sarthaan poda vaada..

enakkula aasa romba irukku
adhaiyellaam sonnaa naan kirukku
emmanasu romba perusu
adhilulla aasaikku
alavu illa.
kanavukku thadai solla yaarumilla.

Aahhaa, Lovely ladies, Lovely ladies
Aahhaa, pari ok my boo right now
Aahhaa Lovely ladies, Lovely ladies
Aahhaa dancing to the move right now

Aadu machi aadu, podu machi podu
adhiradi kalandhida oru aattam

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Lovely Ladies?

The song is an energetic dance number that celebrates fun and excitement.

Who are the singers of Lovely Ladies?

The song is sung by Gaana Bala, Megha, and Vijay Prakash.

In which movie does the song Lovely Ladies appear?

The song appears in the movie Naan Sigappu Manithan.

When was the movie Naan Sigappu Manithan released?

The movie was released in the year 2014.

Who composed the music for Lovely Ladies?

The music for the song was composed by GV Prakash.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Lovely Ladies from Naan Sigappu Manithan is a vibrant and energetic track that captures the essence of celebration and fun. Sung by Gaana Bala, Megha, and Vijay Prakash, it features lively beats and catchy lyrics that make it a perfect fit for parties and festive occasions. The song's upbeat tempo and dynamic rhythm create an atmosphere of excitement, encouraging listeners to dance and enjoy the moment. It reflects the movie's youthful and spirited vibe, adding to its overall appeal.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Lovely Ladies from the movie Naan Sigappu Manithan is a high-energy track that will get you moving to its infectious beats. Featuring the dynamic vocals of Gaana Bala, Megha, and Vijay Prakash, this song is a perfect blend of rhythm and excitement. Dive into the vibrant world of Naan Sigappu Manithan with this peppy number that promises to elevate any celebration.
stanzaMeanings: Aahhaa Lovely ladies, Lovely ladies Aahhaa ..... Aahhaa Lovely ladies, Lovely ladies Aahhaa dancing to the move right now
Dance, friend, dance, join in the excitement for a thrilling dance.
Come dance on the road my father made, shake the ground with your moves.
Don't respect rules and plans, why wear shoes? Just drink a little, come dance, friend.
Change like a kite, fly high, play a wild game, seek happiness.
Come out of the house, enjoy life on the street, when the shell breaks, the chick is born, only when restrictions break, happiness is born. What will a locked heart get?
Look at the WhatsApp girls, like a spicy snack, touch lightly, this is right for a simple guy.
The group that went to Goa, couples dancing, holding hands, shaking heads, let's dance on the ground.
Yesterday is old, tomorrow is on the waiting list, today is gold, let's enjoy it.
Work, work every day, running like Temple Run, let's find some happiness, come on.
I have a lot of desires, if I say them all, I'll seem crazy. My heart is big, and my desires have no limit. No one can stop my dreams.
Dance, friend, dance, join in the excitement for a thrilling dance.
Come dance on the road my father made, shake the ground with your moves.
